overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a lakeside dirt path through a rural village during golden hour. The character passes wooden fences, rustic huts, and NPC villagers while warm sunlight casts long shadows across the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside dirt path approaching wooden dock

events.description: approaching group of NPCs gathered near wooden dock structure by the water

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path toward a group of villagers near the lakeside

notable_agents.action: group of villagers standing near wooden dock structure by the water

entered.detail: winding dirt trail with patches of grass and gravel
calm lake surface reflecting the golden hour sunlight
distant mountains visible across the lake
tall white-barked trees with green foliage
rustic wooden pier extending into the water with vertical posts

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide lakeside path during golden hour, with Geralt walking toward a group of villagers gathered near a wooden dock. The lake stretches to the left with mountains in the distance, while birch trees line the right side of the path.

events.description: passing by the group of NPCs near the wooden dock
moving into more enclosed path section with wooden fences on both sides

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking past the villagers and along the fenced path away from the water

entered.detail: rough-hewn wooden fence posts lining the path
low stone wall running parallel to the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes the villagers and continues along a fenced path that runs parallel to the lake. The wooden dock recedes behind as the path becomes more enclosed by wooden fences and a stone wall, with birch trees now closer on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded path under large oak tree with stone wall

events.description: entering deep shade of large oak tree canopy
emerging from tree shade into open village area with wooden buildings

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks under the spreading branches of a large oak tree and past stone walls

entered.detail: massive spreading oak tree with thick trunk and dense canopy
rustic wooden hut with thatched or shingled roof

segments.scene_description: The path leads under a massive oak tree that blocks the sky and creates deep shade. Geralt passes a stone wall on the right as a wooden hut comes into view in the distance, marking the transition into a more built-up village area.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural village path between wooden huts

events.description: encountering a woman NPC walking toward the camera on the village path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks through the village area passing wooden huts and encounters a woman walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress and white headscarf walking toward the camera

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence with uneven posts
warm lights glowing from buildings in the distance

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges into a narrow village path lined with rustic wooden huts. The large oak tree falls behind as he approaches a woman walking toward him. Distant village lights glow warmly in the fading daylight, suggesting the transition from golden hour toward dusk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a lakeside path that gradually transitions from an open shoreline into a rustic village at dusk. It begins with Geralt walking toward a group of villagers by a wooden dock, with a wide view of the lake and distant mountains to the left and birch trees to the right. As he passes the gathering, the scene shifts to a more enclosed path where the dock recedes and the surroundings are defined by wooden fences and a stone wall. The camera then follows him under the deep shade of a massive oak tree, which momentarily blocks the sky before opening up to reveal a wooden hut in the distance. Finally, the path leads into the heart of the village lined with rustic huts, where the golden hour light fades into the warm glow of distant village lights as a woman approaches from the opposite direction.
